extraction.one_line_summary: NIBALI attacked solo on Val Thorens climb after teammate CICCONE's leadout, holding off VALVERDE for stage win while BERNAL secured GC.
tactical_patterns: Movistar deployed dual options with VALVERDE/QUINTANA attacking separately rather than combining forces, fragmenting their podium push.
JUMBO-VISMA used BENNETT then DE PLUS sequential pacing to elevate KRUIJSWIJK to podium, superior team depth execution.
NIBALI attacked with teammate CICCONE still visible ahead, using Bahrain's multiple presence to force MOVISTAR's response decision.
ALAPHILIPPE cracked precisely when DE PLUS went maximum on front, suggesting Deceuninck miscalculated yellow jersey pacing reserves.

rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: negative: cracked when JUMBO increased pace through DE PLUS, revealing insufficient climbing preparation for multi-Alpine stage blocks
rider_signals.DE PLUS Laurens: positive: set ferocious pace for 28km+ before emptying at 5.6km, exceptional domestique range rarely seen
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: personally paced BERNAL to finish line rather than delegating, showing defending champion prioritized team GC over personal placing
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: positive: solo attack succeeded despite having teammate ahead, indicating rivals calculated he lacked stage-winning form
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: negative: dropped before ALAPHILIPPE despite being protected GC rider, Trek's multi-leader strategy failed under pressure
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: neutral: caught teammate LANDA for second, but inability to bridge to NIBALI suggests diminished acceleration at altitude
